name: O-7 per-rule canary: --reason operator-decision allows manual demotion without the 14-day window
command: mkdir -p tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/canary-promote.sh" --rule-id g-ts-test --to warn-only --tree "$PWD/tree" --reason operator-decision 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'rule_state: warn-only' tree/google/x.yaml && echo demoted 1>&2
